node.text: Calvin values the importance of believing in oneself and not giving up.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "stay motivated setbacks") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Calvin finds motivation in reminding himself of his passion for goals and taking breaks for favorite activities.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "stay motivated setbacks") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.89)

node.text: Calvin's car was in a crash but is now fixed and going strong.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "stay motivated setbacks") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.72)

node.text: Calvin finds joy in what he does even though it can be overwhelming due to the demands.
Calvin had an incident last week where his place got flooded, but he managed to save his music gear and favorite microphone.
Calvin finds having a strong support system including friends and team helpful in managing everything.
Calvin values inspiration and mutual support with Dave, aiming to keep inspiring each other to be their best selves.
Calvin is working on music collaborations with Japanese artists and is excited about it.
Calvin is passionate about music and performing, finding it like his purpose and passion.
Calvin loves his job and enjoys connecting with the crowd, particularly through music.
